name: intent-fable-codex
description: Intent-locked, evidence-gated Codex workflow that combines light task routing with optional goal and findings gates.

interface.longDescription: Intent Fable Codex is a local Codex skill prototype that combines fable-mode style output locking, depth and tool budgets, and visible route contracts with FableCodex style evidence checkpoints, findings gates, and final verification discipline.
defaultPrompt: Lock intent, then implement and verify.
